options.name: -all
options.description: Reports all applied and ignored path exceptions

options.name: -early
options.description: Generates the path exception report for early reports

options.name: -ignored
options.description: Reports only the path exceptions that have been ignored by timing analysis

options.name: -late
options.description: Generates the path exception report for late reports

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Produces the report in Tcl list format instead of a tabular format

options.name: -view
options.description: Generates a timing check report for the specified analysis view only. By default all active views are reported (string, optional) > <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file
